# MuleSoft Azure Cosmos DB Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of Azure Cosmos DB Connector documentation.
> See [Azure Cosmos DB Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-cosmos-db-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Azure Cosmos DB Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Azure Cosmos DB Connector 1.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-cosmos-db-connector/latest/azure-cosmos-db-connector-examples.md)
- [Azure Cosmos DB Connector 1.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-cosmos-db-connector/latest/azure-cosmos-db-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Azure Cosmos DB 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-cosmos-db-connector/latest/azure-cosmos-db-connector-studio.md)
- [Azure Cosmos DB Connector 1.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-cosmos-db-connector/latest/azure-cosmos-db-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Azure Cosmos DB Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-cosmos-db-connector/latest/index.md)
